title: MOSTFUN 21PCS Mini Ratchet Wrench with Screwdriver Bits & Sockets, Right Angle Phillips Magnetic + 1/4" Drive High Torque Offset Reversible Ratcheting Offset Screwdriver
features: 【Compact Right-Angle Design】: The Mini Ratchet Wrench features a right-angle design, making it ideal for reaching tight, awkward spaces where traditional tools can't fit. Perfect for automotive repairs, home projects, or electronics work, this tool allows for precise and efficient work in confined areas.

【High Torque with Reversible Mechanism】: Equipped with a 1/4-inch(110mm) drive, this right angle screwdriver delivers excellent torque for effective screw fastening and loosening. The reversible ratcheting function allows you to easily switch between clockwise and counterclockwise rotation for increased versatility and ease of use.

【Magnetic Screwdriver for Secure Handling】: The magnetic tip securely holds screws in place, preventing them from falling or getting lost. This feature is especially useful when working with small or delicate screws in tight spaces, ensuring a smooth and efficient process. Equipped with a magnetizer/demagnetizer – Achieve instant magnetization or demagnetization by simply sliding the screwdriver through the slot 1-5 times.

【Ergonomic Handle for Comfort and Control】: The ergonomic, non-slip handle ensures a comfortable, firm grip, reducing hand fatigue during prolonged use. Its compact size and lightweight design make it easy to maneuver, providing optimal control and convenience for your projects.

【Complete Set of Bits and Sockets】: This tool comes with a full set of screwdriver bits (including 4, 5, 6, PZ1, PZ2, PH1, PH2, T15, T20, AD) and sockets of 5mm to 13mm sizes, making it suitable for a wide range of tasks. Comes with a tool bag for easy storage and organization. Whether you're tackling DIY projects, repairs, or installations, this ratchet screwdriver set has you covered for all your needs.
description: Product Description Product Name: Mini Ratchet Wrench, Right Angle Phillips Magnetic Screwdriver for Awkward Spaces, with 1/4 Inch Drive High Torque Offset Reversible Mini Ratcheting Offset Screwdriver, with Screwdriver Bits and Sockets Set Features: - Compact and Versatile Design: The Mini Ratchet Wrench features a right-angle design, making it the perfect tool for tackling those difficult-to-reach screws in tight or awkward spaces. Ideal for use in automotive repairs, home maintenance, electronics, and DIY projects, this tool allows you to work in places where larger tools just won't fit. - High Torque and Reversible Mechanism: Equipped with a 1/4-inch drive, this mini ratchet wrench delivers excellent torque, making it suitable for loosening or tightening screws with ease. The reversible ratcheting mechanism allows for smooth, efficient switching between clockwise and counterclockwise operation, increasing productivity and minimizing the need to reposition the tool. - Magnetic Screwdriver for Secure Fit: The built-in magnet securely holds the screw, ensuring it stays in place while you're working. This feature is especially useful when working with small screws or in tight spaces where it's easy for screws to fall or get lost. - Complete Set with Bits and Sockets: The wrench comes with a variety of screwdriver bits (Phillips, flathead, and more) and sockets, providing you with everything you need for a wide range of tasks. These high-quality bits and sockets are designed for durability and long-lasting performance, ensuring you have the right tool for every job. - Ergonomic Handle for Comfort: Designed for maximum comfort, the ergonomic, non-slip handle provides a firm grip, reducing hand fatigue during extended use. Its compact size makes it easy to maneuver and store, making this tool a convenient addition to your toolbox. Specifications: - Drive Size: 1/4 Inch (110mm) - Material: High-quality steel for durability - Ratchet Mechanism: Reversible (Clockwise/Counterclockwise) - Magnet: Built-in magnetic feature for secure screw placement - Handle: Ergonomic, non-slip design for comfort and control - Includes: Screwdriver bits (Phillips, flathead, etc.) and sockets for various tasks Package Contents: - 1 x Mini Ratchet Wrench (Right Angle Phillips Magnetic Screwdriver) - 1 x Screwdriver Bits Set (4, 5, 6, PZ1, PZ2, PH1, PH2, T15, T20, AD) - 1 x Socket Set (5/6/7/8/9/10/11/12/13mm) - 1 x Magnetizer Demagnetizer Tools - 1 x Tool Bag The Mini Ratchet Wrench is an essential tool for professionals and DIY enthusiasts alike. Whether you're working on automotive repairs, home improvement, or electronics, this versatile tool provides the convenience, durability, and precision you need to get the job done right. With its compact size, high torque, and complete set of screwdriver bits and sockets, it’s the perfect tool for working in tight spaces and tackling a wide range of projects.
